title: British Breakfast Fry-Up
description: A classic British breakfast dish made with fried eggs, bacon, and sausages.
instructions: 1. Heat a large frying pan over medium-high heat.
2. Add the butter and let it melt.
3. Add the bacon and cook until crispy.
4. Add the sausages and cook until browned.
5. Crack the eggs into a bowl and whisk them together.
6. Pour the eggs over the bacon and sausages in the pan.
7. Stir the eggs gently until they are cooked through.
8. Serve the breakfast hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
